notes: Recognizable two-view rendering of the input photo with correct pose and proportions, but arm differentiation is muddled and sucker rendering reads as photo-trace noise rather than clean ringed suckers.
specific_issues: arms clumped together rather than rendered as 8 distinct arms + 2 tentacles
sucker rendering reads as squiggle/dash clutter instead of FAO-style ring suckers
scattered short arc fragments across the body create photo-trace noise
fin-mantle outline has small breaks and stray segments rather than a single clean continuous contour
tentacular club tips lack the clear paddle definition visible in the photo
stipple is appropriately sparse but somewhat scattered outside the actual chromatophore zones
